mapper.sql: mall_order_item.`id`, mall_order_item.`del_flag`, mall_order_item.`create_time`, mall_order_item.`update_time`, mall_order_item.`order_id`, mall_order_item.`spu_id`, mall_order_item.`sku_id`, mall_order_item.`spu_name`, mall_order_item.`pic_url`, mall_order_item.`quantity`, mall_order_item.`sales_price`, mall_order_item.`freight_price`, mall_order_item.`payment_price`, mall_order_item.`remark`, mall_order_item.`status`, mall_order_item.`is_refund`, mall_order_item.`spec_info`, mall_order_item.`refund_reason`, mall_order_item.`refund_apply_time`, mall_order_item.`refund_audit_remark`, mall_order_item.`refund_audit_time`, mall_order_item.`refund_success_time`

sql.where:
AND ( (mall_order_item.`status` IN ('1', '2', '3') AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0') OR mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1' )
AND mall_order_info.`user_id` = #{query.userId}
AND mall_order_item.`status` = '1' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0'
AND mall_order_item.`status` = '2' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0'
AND mall_order_item.`status` = '3' AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '0'
AND mall_order_item.`is_refund` = '1'
AND mall_order_info.`order_no` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND mall_user.`user_no` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userNo}, '%')
AND mall_user.`nick_name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userNickName}, '%')
AND mall_user.`real_name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userRealName}, '%')
AND mall_user.`mobile` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userMobile}, '%')
AND mall_order_item.`spu_name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.spuNameKeyword}, '%')
AND mall_order_item.`refund_apply_time` >= #{query.beginTime}
AND mall_order_item.`refund_apply_time` <= #{query.endTime}

mapper.select: SELECT , mall_order_info.`order_no`, mall_order_info.`user_id`, mall_order_info.`status` AS `order_status`, mall_order_info.`is_pay` AS `order_is_pay`, mall_order_info.`create_time` AS `order_create_time`, mall_order_info.`payment_time` AS `order_payment_time`, mall_order_info.`delivery_time` AS `order_delivery_time`, mall_order_info.`receiver_time` AS `order_receiver_time`, mall_user.`user_no`, mall_user.`nick_name` AS `user_nick_name`, mall_user.`real_name` AS `user_real_name`, mall_user.`mobile` AS `user_mobile`, mall_user.`avatar_url` AS `user_avatar_url` FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item LEFT JOIN mall_order_info mall_order_info ON mall_order_info.`id` = mall_order_item.`order_id` LEFT JOIN mall_user mall_user ON mall_user.`id` = mall_order_info.`user_id`

SELECT COUNT(1) AS `totalCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`status` = '1' AND result_set.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `applyingCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`status` = '2' AND result_set.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `rejectCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`status` = '3' AND result_set.`is_refund` = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `waitingRefundCount`, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN result_set.`is_refund` = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `refundedCount`, COALESCE(SUM(result_set.`payment_price`), 0) AS `refundAmount` FROM ( SELECT mall_order_item.`status`, mall_order_item.`is_refund`, mall_order_item.`payment_price` FROM mall_order_item mall_order_item LEFT JOIN mall_order_info mall_order_info ON mall_order_info.`id` = mall_order_item.`order_id` LEFT JOIN mall_user mall_user ON mall_user.`id` = mall_order_info.`user_id`
) result_set
